description: Composition Navy blue printed top made of 100% cotton, has cap sleeves with elasticated cuffs with lace edging, a mandarin collar with a slit, half-buttoned placket, pin-tucks either side of placket on front, embroidered branding on back yoke and elasticated smocking at hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm using mild detergent Wash dark colours seperately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach, wring or dry clean Flat dry or tumble dry in shade Warm iron This flirty, printed navy blue top with puffed sleeves is the season's summer essential. lee can be relied upon to offer us something special, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
